name: Gates Scholarship
amount: Up to full cost of attendance (gap funding beyond other aid)

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or permanent resident or DACA
eligibility.other_requirements: Pell Grant eligible; minority student of color; strong leadership and community involvement

stackable_notes: Designed as a last-dollar scholarship — fills the gap after all other federal, state, and institutional aid is applied. Does not displace existing institutional grants. Renewable through undergraduate degree.
notes: One of the most comprehensive scholarships available — covers full unmet need through graduation. Restricted to specific minority groups with strong academic and leadership records. Only ~300 awards per year nationally, making the acceptance rate under 1% of applicants; academic excellence alone is insufficient without demonstrated leadership impact.
